# STRAT.045 ? Regret Minimization (Bezos)

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** strategic_frameworks
**Subcategory:** decision_making_frameworks
**Domain:** DECISION_MAKING_FRAMEWORKS
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Project to age 80; minimize future regret; long-term perspective; action regret vs inaction regret; significant decisions

## Application
Imagine future self; which choice minimizes regret; long-term lens; risk inaction regret; bold on important decisions; 10-10-10 rule

## Key Values
- Future self
- Regret minimization
- Long-term view
- Action bias
- Significance focus

## Tags
philosophy, strategic-framework, decision_making_frameworks

## Notes
Strategic framework ingested into philosophy library per operator mapping rule.
